hero.title: Technical Solutions for the Global Packaging Industry
hero.subtitle: Excellence in machinery, critical parts supply, and specialized technical assistance for the metalworking sector.

footer.companyDesc: Global leader in engineering solutions for metal packaging. Over 30 years ensuring efficiency and innovation for manufacturers worldwide.

servicesSection.usedMachineryDesc: Strategic sourcing and trading of high-performance production lines and equipment for the metal industry.
servicesSection.sparePartsDesc: Agile identification and logistics of critical spare parts, including obsolete and high-precision components.
servicesSection.techAssistanceDesc: Specialized diagnosis, technical audits, and remote or on-site operational support.
servicesSection.revampingDesc: Life extension and technological updates (revamping) of existing lines for maximum productivity.
servicesSection.tradingDesc: Strategic supply of tinplate and aluminum with a focus on technical quality and logistical efficiency.

productsSection.desc: High-end machinery and technical components designed for maximum durability and operational precision.

premiumCta.desc: From technical sourcing to complete modernization of production lines.

splitLayout.title: Technical Mastery. Global Vision.
splitLayout.desc1: Soprani Engineering combines decades of industrial expertise with a logistical infrastructure serving the world's major manufacturing hubs.
splitLayout.desc2: We understand the complexity of modern manufacturing and deliver solutions that ensure operational continuity.
splitLayout.f1_desc: Deep knowledge in industrial automation and mechanics.
splitLayout.f2_desc: Integrated logistics connecting global suppliers and clients.
splitLayout.f3_desc: Rapid response to critical market demands.

stats.title: Performance in Numbers
stats.desc: The metric of our success is the productivity of the industrial plants we support.

aboutPage.heroSub: Your strategic partner for excellence in metal packaging on a global scale.
aboutPage.intExcP1: Soprani Engineering is a reference in metal packaging solutions, integrating expertise in machinery, parts, and trading.
aboutPage.intExcP2: With over 30 years of operation, we connect Italian technology with the production demands of Europe, the Americas, and Asia.
aboutPage.intExcP3: Our commitment is to technical quality, commercial agility, and long-term relationships.
aboutPage.cv1D: Excellence in every diagnosis and supplied component.
aboutPage.cv2D: Global connectivity for critical and complex deliveries.
aboutPage.cv3D: Solutions adapted to the operational reality of each client.
aboutPage.cv4D: Total transparency in commercial and technical negotiations.
aboutPage.ex1D: Strategic search for the ideal machinery for your plant.
aboutPage.ex2D: Comprehensive catalog of technical and critical components.
aboutPage.ex3D: Solving complex problems on production lines.
aboutPage.ex4D: Modernization and automation of legacy equipment.
aboutPage.ex5D: Specialized trading of tinplate and aluminum sheet.
aboutPage.ex6D: Decades of experience focused on the packaging sector.

servicesPage.heroSub: Integral solutions to maximize manufacturing performance in the metalworking sector.
servicesPage.usedMachD: Specialized sourcing and support for the acquisition of high-performance industrial equipment.
servicesPage.sparePartsD: Intelligent supply of critical parts to minimize operational downtime.
servicesPage.spP2: Support for obsolete or rare parts
servicesPage.techAssistanceD: Specialized technical support, diagnosis, and optimization of industrial processes.
servicesPage.revampingD: Technological update of assets to increase productivity and energy efficiency.
servicesPage.rv4: Technical and financial feasibility of projects
servicesPage.tradingD: Strategic access to global suppliers of high-quality tinplate and aluminum.
servicesPage.ctaDesc: Consult our technical team for a personalized diagnosis of your operational needs.

companyPage.p1: Soprani Engineering is an organization dedicated to driving the global metal packaging industry through advanced engineering and commercial intelligence.
companyPage.p2: Our mission is to provide solutions that unite Italian technical mastery with the agility required for the contemporary market, supporting our partners in every phase of the production cycle.
companyPage.subTitle: Corporate Structure
companyPage.subDesc: Our network of technical and strategic collaboration
companyPage.com1D: Focus on technical innovation and manufacturing modernization.
companyPage.com2D: Constant search for the best metallurgy technologies.
companyPage.com3D: Delivering solutions that positively impact the client's bottom line.

contactPage.heroSub: Our team of experts is ready to meet your demands in any industrial hub in the world.
contactPage.getInTouchDesc: Specialized technical and commercial support for the packaging industry.
contactPage.thxDesc: Your contact has been forwarded to the responsible technical department. We will return soon.

contactPage.svcSub: Learn about our industrial specialties in detail.

newsPage.heroSub: Technical updates and Soprani innovations on the global packaging stage.

productsPage.heroSub: Technical portfolio focused on efficiency and reliability for the metal industry.
productsPage.emptyProducts: No systems found for this selection.

machineryPage.heroSub: Advanced production lines and selected equipment for metal packaging.
machineryPage.introP1: We specialize in the strategic supply of machinery for can and packaging production. Through our international network, we identify high-value production assets.
machineryPage.introP2: Our portfolio ranges from initial molding and pressing to sophisticated final decoration and inspection systems.
machineryPage.ctaDesc: Get in touch to discuss your project and learn about the industrial asset opportunities available in the global market.
machineryPage.weldingD: High-precision systems for can body welding with maximum reliability.
machineryPage.canD: Integrated production ecosystems for large-scale manufacturing.
machineryPage.pressesD: High-cadence presses for molding lids and metal components.
machineryPage.decoratingD: Specialized equipment for printing and aesthetic coating.
machineryPage.coatingD: Internal and external protection with precise application of varnishes and lacquers.
machineryPage.handlingD: Handling and transport systems for uninterrupted factory flows.
machineryPage.inspectionD: Vision inspection systems and real-time integrity testing.

sparePartsPage.heroSub: Global supply of high-precision spare parts for the metal industry.
sparePartsPage.introP1: Line downtime represents a high cost. We ensure the agile supply of original and compatible parts, specializing in rare or obsolete components.
sparePartsPage.introP2: We use our logistical infrastructure to deliver critical parts with maximum technical rigor and reduced lead times.
sparePartsPage.b1D: Precise specification analysis to ensure full compatibility.
sparePartsPage.b2D: Optimized distribution network for delivery to any continent.
sparePartsPage.b3D: Components that meet or exceed original factory standards.
sparePartsPage.b4D: Specialization in keeping classic machines operational for longer.
sparePartsPage.f1D: Deep knowledge of the main brands and models in the sector.
sparePartsPage.f2D: Direct connections with manufacturers and strategic global inventories.
sparePartsPage.f3D: Each component is checked to ensure maximum performance.
sparePartsPage.f4D: Field consulting to assist in installation and maintenance.
sparePartsPage.f5D: Competitive pricing through volume purchasing and global negotiation.
sparePartsPage.f6D: Full readiness to assist your factory in times of crisis.
sparePartsPage.ctaDesc: We have access to the world's leading packaging parts catalogs. Speak now with our logistical-technical team.

tradingPage.heroSub: Global supply of tinplate and aluminum for metal packaging manufacturers.
tradingPage.introP1: Strategic access to the main metal refining and manufacturing centers. We connect your industrial plant to certified supplies.
tradingPage.introP2: We ensure flexible volumes and precise technical specifications to meet your production schedules.
tradingPage.m1D: High-quality material for canning, aerosols, and decorative cans with full food compliance.
tradingPage.m2D: Lightweight and strong alloys, ideal for beverage cans and closures with excellent cost-benefit.
tradingPage.b1D: Direct connection with producers, eliminating excess intermediaries.
tradingPage.b2D: Delivery via strategic port hubs to reduce lead times and costs.
tradingPage.b3D: Strict control of hardness, thickness, and coating as ordered.
tradingPage.b4D: Support in negotiations and diversity of volumes for your factory.
tradingPage.s1D: Guarantee that the material meets the technical requirements of your region.
tradingPage.s2D: Support in choosing the best metal composition for your product.
tradingPage.s3D: Continuous supply plans to ensure your presses never stop.
tradingPage.s4D: Full coordination of international freight to your manufacturing plant.
tradingPage.s6D: Specialized guidance to optimize your industrial raw material purchases.
tradingPage.ctaDesc: We have the exact material in the volume your industry demands. Speak with our metal trading now.

techPage.heroSub: Specialized support to maximize the performance and longevity of your production lines globally.
techPage.introP1: Italian technical expertise at the service of your equipment.
techPage.introP2: Our engineering team offers precise diagnostics and agile interventions to ensure your plant operates at peak efficiency.
techPage.s1D: Quick response to critical failures, minimizing losses from unscheduled downtime.
techPage.s2D: Detailed evaluation of mechanical and electronic cycles for speed and quality gains.
techPage.s3D: Consulting in the development of high-impact preventive maintenance plans.
techPage.s4D: Training local teams for safe operation and basic asset maintenance.

mphPage.heroSub: The centralized platform connecting the main global players in the metal packaging industry.
mphPage.csDesc: MPH is the digital evolution of Soprani Engineering, a complete platform designed to simplify partnerships, trading, and industrial services in a single hub.
mphPage.whatTitle: What is the Metal Packaging Hub?
mphPage.whatP1: A B2B ecosystem focused exclusively on the packaging sector, connecting manufacturers to real solutions.
mphPage.whatP2: Agility, transparency, and technology in favor of your commercial and technical profitability.
mphPage.f1D: Facilitation of global negotiations for machinery and metals in a secure environment.
mphPage.f2D: Verified directory of industry specialists, suppliers, and manufacturers.
mphPage.f3D: Early access to industrial assets and material stocks worldwide.
mphPage.f4D: Reduction of bureaucracy and acceleration of the sourcing cycle through digital tools.
mphPage.w1D: Everything your metallurgy needs in a single digital address.
mphPage.w2D: Focus on closing the deal with the confidence of the Soprani brand.
mphPage.w3D: Reduction of search costs and improvement in prices through healthy competition.
mphPage.ctaTitle: Be One of the First to Access MPH
mphPage.ctaDesc: Register your interest and receive exclusive updates on the launch of the platform that will revolutionize the sector.

reqPage.heroSub: Customized solutions for machinery, spare parts, and technical assistance for the global metal packaging industry.
reqPage.thxDesc: Thank you for your interest. Our technical team will analyze your request and get in touch with a detailed proposal as soon as possible.
reqPage.msgPlace: Describe here the technical specifications or any relevant details for your quotation...
